subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! A letter from thee was received and brought joy, for it indicated [thy] well-being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مبارک نامه ای از شما رسید و سبب سرور گردید زیرا دلالت بر صحت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause, @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
